code_prompt_defaults.object_description: an isometric voxel-cube structure with orthographic projection panels when needed

cube_count: How many unit cubes are in the shown voxel structure?
Count all unit cubes in the isometric voxel structure.
How many small cubes make up the structure?
Find the total number of unit cubes in the structure.
Using the visible stack heights, how many unit cubes are present?
missing_to_complete_cuboid_count: How many unit cubes must be added to the changed structure to make the complete reference cuboid?
Compare the two structures. How many cubes are missing from the changed structure?
How many cubes need to be added to the changed structure so it matches the reference cuboid?
The reference shows the complete cuboid. How many cubes are absent from the changed version?
Count the cubes that must be inserted into the changed structure to complete the reference cuboid.
removed_cube_count: How many unit cubes were removed from the reference structure to get the changed structure?
Compare the structures. How many cubes are present in the reference but absent in the changed version?
Count the cubes removed between the reference and changed voxel structures.
How many cubes disappeared from the reference structure?
Find the number of unit cubes missing from the changed structure relative to the reference.
visible_projection_count: In the {view_direction} orthographic view, how many projection-grid cells should be filled?
Looking from the {view_direction} direction, count the filled cells in the orthographic projection.
How many cells are occupied in the {view_direction} view projection?
Use the stack to fill the {view_direction} view grid. How many cells would be filled?
For the {view_direction} projection, count the grid cells covered by at least one cube.
projection_match_label: Which labeled option matches the {view_direction} orthographic projection of the voxel structure?
Choose the option that shows the correct {view_direction} view projection.
Which projection option is the {view_direction} view of the structure?
Look at the structure from the {view_direction} direction. Which labeled grid is correct?
Select the labeled option matching the structure's {view_direction} projection.

query:cube_count.answer_instruction: the total unit-cube count as an integer
query:cube_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the voxel structure.

query:missing_to_complete_cuboid_count.answer_instruction: the number of cubes that must be added as an integer
query:missing_to_complete_cuboid_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a JSON array of image-pixel bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1], one around each compared structure.

query:removed_cube_count.answer_instruction: the number of removed cubes as an integer
query:removed_cube_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a JSON array of image-pixel bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1], one around each compared structure.

query:visible_projection_count.answer_instruction: the filled projection-cell count as an integer
query:visible_projection_count.annotation_hint: Set annotation to a JSON array of image-pixel bounding boxes [x0,y0,x1,y1], one for each projection-grid cell that should be filled.

query:projection_match_label.answer_instruction: the label of the matching projection option
query:projection_match_label.annotation_hint: Set annotation to one image-pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the selected projection option panel.
